name: GolfDojo
about: GolfDojo operates as a chain of indoor golf simulation venues across Western New York, featuring advanced technology for golf practice and play. The facilities utilize TrackMan dual radar technology for high-fidelity ball and club tracking, allowing players to experience a variety of virtual golf courses. With a focus on accessibility, the venues offer public bookings daily from 10am to 10pm, alongside 24/7 access for members. Pricing models include per-bay hourly rates and various membership options to suit different player needs.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art TrackMan dual radar technology for accurate ball and club data
Multiple locations across Western New York for convenient access
Variety of membership packages and flexible booking options
PGA-certified professional instruction available for all skill levels
24/7 member access for flexible practice schedules

food_and_drink.notes: Food is available on-site, as evidenced by images showing tables with pizza
No information about alcohol service is provided

simulator_hardware.notes: Dual radar technology for precise ball and club tracking

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you should bring your own golf clubs to use the simulators. The facility is equipped with hitting bays and practice areas designed for personal equipment.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, external food and drinks are not permitted. The venue offers on-site food service, as evidenced by pizza being available for customers during their sessions.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time to play 18 holes varies depending on the number of players and pace of play. Each bay can accommodate multiple players, allowing groups to complete rounds efficiently.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, GolfDojo offers junior lesson packages and programs, indicating a commitment to catering to younger golfers and families.
